scheme_name: Ayushman Bharat Health and Wellness Centres (AB-HWC)
ministry_department: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
short_description: Comprehensive primary healthcare services including screening, treatment, and wellness at 1.5 lakh centres across India.
detailed_description: Ayushman Bharat Health and Wellness Centres (AB-HWCs) deliver Comprehensive Primary Health Care (CPHC), bringing health care closer to the homes of people. These centres provide a wide range of services including screening for non-communicable diseases, maternal and child health services, free essential drugs and diagnostic services, and wellness activities. The AB-HWCs are transforming existing Sub Centres and Primary Health Centres into Health and Wellness Centres.
key_benefits: Free screening for diabetes, hypertension, and common cancers
Free essential drugs and diagnostic services

REQUIRED_DOCUMENTS.description: For identification and health record maintenance
Voter ID, Ration Card, or any identity proof

application_steps_offline: Locate nearest AB-HWC using the official portal or mobile app
Visit the centre during working hours
Register at the reception with basic details
Consult with health worker or doctor
Receive free medicines and diagnostic services as prescribed

submission_locations.address: 1.5 lakh centres across India (former Sub Centres and PHCs)
submission_locations.notes: Use AB-HWC mobile app to locate nearest centre

faq.question: Do I need to register or enroll for AB-HWC services?
faq.answer: No, AB-HWCs are walk-in facilities. You can visit the nearest centre without any prior registration.

faq.question: Are all services completely free?
faq.answer: Yes, all services including consultation, essential medicines, and basic diagnostic tests are provided free of cost.

faq.question: How do I find the nearest AB-HWC?
faq.answer: You can use the AB-HWC mobile app or visit the official website to locate the nearest Health and Wellness Centre.

common_rejection_reasons: Services not available at specific centre (varies by location)
Specialized treatment requiring referral to higher facility
tips_for_successful_application: Visit during morning hours to avoid rush
Carry any previous medical records if available
Use the AB-HWC app to check services available at specific centre
Bring identity proof for first visit to create health record
